title: begonia lichenora
intro: Begonia lichenora, also known as Begonia, is a plant species that belongs to the Begoniaceae family. It is a species of flowering plant that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The Begonia lichenora plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which have been reported to have health benefits including reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
